channel.title: wax helsinki
channel.description: DJ mixes and sets from wax helsinki.
channel.itunes:author: wax helsinki
channel.itunes:summary: DJ mixes and sets from wax helsinki.

item.title: WAXMIX 027
item.description: A live three-hour transmission from Aaniwalli, moving from deep pressure into late-afternoon lift.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: A live three-hour transmission from Aaniwalli, moving from deep pressure into late-afternoon lift.

item.title: WAXMIX 026
item.description: A subterranean pulse of pressure and glow, where concrete rhythms bend into dawn-lit drift.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: A subterranean pulse of pressure and glow, where concrete rhythms bend into dawn-lit drift.

item.title: WAXMIX 025
item.description: Soft-edged momentum and shadowy swing, unfolding like a city exhale after midnight.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Soft-edged momentum and shadowy swing, unfolding like a city exhale after midnight.

item.title: WAXMIX 024
item.description: Long corridors of groove and haze, tracing a slow arc between tension and release.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Long corridors of groove and haze, tracing a slow arc between tension and release.

item.title: WAXMIX 023
item.description: Warm bass gravity with flickers of light, a compact trip through velvet motion.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Warm bass gravity with flickers of light, a compact trip through velvet motion.

item.title: WAXMIX 022
item.description: Crisp percussion over a steady undertow, all angles softened by nocturnal air.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Crisp percussion over a steady undertow, all angles softened by nocturnal air.

item.title: WAXMIX 021
item.description: Live-room friction and crowd heat, captured as a raw ribbon of forward motion.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Live-room friction and crowd heat, captured as a raw ribbon of forward motion.

item.title: WAXMIX 020
item.description: Hypnotic loops tightening and loosening like breath in a darkened warehouse.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Hypnotic loops tightening and loosening like breath in a darkened warehouse.

item.title: WAXMIX 019
item.description: Lean grooves and low-end murmurs, built for locked focus and moving silhouettes.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Lean grooves and low-end murmurs, built for locked focus and moving silhouettes.

item.title: WAXMIX 018
item.description: Sun-faded moods and loose rhythm dust, drifting between memory and breeze.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Sun-faded moods and loose rhythm dust, drifting between memory and breeze.

item.title: WAXMIX 017
item.description: House warmth in soft focus, balancing glide, bounce, and late-hour shimmer.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: House warmth in soft focus, balancing glide, bounce, and late-hour shimmer.

item.title: WAXMIX 016
item.description: Stripped forms and suspended tension, a minimal current with quiet insistence.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Stripped forms and suspended tension, a minimal current with quiet insistence.

item.title: WAXMIX 015
item.description: A live cut of intimate swing, where deep chords lean into floor-level heat.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: A live cut of intimate swing, where deep chords lean into floor-level heat.

item.title: WAXMIX 014
item.description: Two voices in dialogue, carving space with patient pressure and room tone.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Two voices in dialogue, carving space with patient pressure and room tone.

item.title: WAXMIX 013
item.description: After-hours shapes and elastic cadence, held together by a smoky underglow.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: After-hours shapes and elastic cadence, held together by a smoky underglow.

item.title: WAXMIX 012
item.description: Chilled propulsion with a distant gleam, like neon reflected on wet pavement.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Chilled propulsion with a distant gleam, like neon reflected on wet pavement.

item.title: WAXMIX 011
item.description: Warehouse weight and grainy momentum, driven by tactile rhythm and intent.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Warehouse weight and grainy momentum, driven by tactile rhythm and intent.

item.title: WAXMIX 010
item.description: Raw club energy rendered as rolling steel, sparks, and low-frequency pull.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Raw club energy rendered as rolling steel, sparks, and low-frequency pull.

item.title: WAXMIX 009
item.description: Punchy contours and deep flow, a compact map of tension points and release.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Punchy contours and deep flow, a compact map of tension points and release.

item.title: WAXMIX 008
item.description: Dubby textures and long pressure lines, stretching time into a single arc.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Dubby textures and long pressure lines, stretching time into a single arc.

item.title: WAXMIX 007
item.description: Dense yet breathable, with deep motion threading through shifting shadows.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Dense yet breathable, with deep motion threading through shifting shadows.

item.title: WAXMIX 006
item.description: Driving drums and hypnotic undertones, tuned for tunnel vision and lift.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Driving drums and hypnotic undertones, tuned for tunnel vision and lift.

item.title: WAXMIX 005
item.description: Groove-led and sharp-edged, where swing flickers against industrial grain.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Groove-led and sharp-edged, where swing flickers against industrial grain.

item.title: WAXMIX 004
item.description: A long-form descent through deep strata, equal parts force and atmosphere.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: A long-form descent through deep strata, equal parts force and atmosphere.

item.title: WAXMIX 003
item.description: Dark percussion and dubbed space, unfolding like machinery in slow motion.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Dark percussion and dubbed space, unfolding like machinery in slow motion.

item.title: WAXMIX 002
item.description: Soulful traces inside a heads-down throb, balancing warmth with restless push.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: Soulful traces inside a heads-down throb, balancing warmth with restless push.

item.title: WAXMIX 001
item.description: A foundational pulse: classic rhythm forms reframed in raw, nocturnal tone.
item.itunes:author: wax helsinki
item.itunes:summary: A foundational pulse: classic rhythm forms reframed in raw, nocturnal tone.
